description: Get Component Enabled is a ProtoFlux node Takes an IComponent and gets if it's enabled or not.

fields.* ([[Impulses|Call]]): Impulse this to set Component (IComponent)'s enabled field to State (bool).
fields.Component: The IComponent to set the enabled field for.
fields.State: Whether to turn the Component (IComponent)'s enabled field to true or false.
fields.Next: Fires after * (Call) is called and the Component (IComponent)'s enabled field is set to State (bool).
